products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Professional software solutions designed for healthcare and business management in Afghanistan.

productCrown.description: A comprehensive dental practice management solution designed to streamline every aspect of your clinic. From patient records to financial reports, Crown handles it all with elegance and precision.

productLabra.description: Empower your dental laboratory with seamless order management, production tracking, and client communication. Labra brings efficiency and organization to every workflow.

productTajviz.description: Replace handwritten prescriptions with a modern, legible, and professional digital prescription system. Tajviz improves accuracy and enhances the patient experience.

about.title: About Emransoft
about.subtitle: We are a team of passionate software engineers dedicated to transforming healthcare and business operations across Afghanistan through modern, reliable technology.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: Build reliable, beautiful, and professional software solutions that help healthcare centers and businesses across Afghanistan become more productive.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To become Afghanistan's most trusted software company, empowering every healthcare provider and business with modern technology.

values.title: Our Values
values.desc: Reliability, integrity, innovation, and customer success are at the core of everything we build. We put our customers first.

about.story: Emransoft was founded with a simple mission: bring professional, reliable software to Afghan healthcare providers. We saw that clinics and dental practices in Afghanistan were using outdated methods or generic software that didn't meet their needs. So we built solutions designed specifically for the Afghan market — offline capable, easy to use, and built with modern technology. Today, we serve over 100 customers across 10+ provinces, and we are growing every year.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Emransoft ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our software products.
privacy.section1Desc: We collect information that you voluntarily provide to us when you fill out a contact form, register for our software, or communicate with us. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and organization details.
privacy.section2Desc: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our software services, to communicate with you about your account, and to send you technical updates and support information.
privacy.section3Desc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information. However, no electronic transmission or storage method is 100% secure.
privacy.section4Desc: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at {email}.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Desc: By accessing or using Emransoft software and website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.section2Desc: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use our software products subject to payment of applicable fees and compliance with these terms.
terms.section3Desc: You agree to use our software in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations. You shall not attempt to reverse engineer, modify, or distribute our software without explicit written permission.
terms.section4Desc: All intellectual property rights in our software, website, and branding remain the property of Emransoft. These terms do not grant you any ownership rights.
terms.section5Desc: Emransoft shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of our software.
terms.section6Desc: For questions about these terms, contact us at {email}.
